sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71562" key="ceno/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξενόφων-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71562.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speaking</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding strange,</tr_> rejected by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
